Name: Jixie.A-Brawl
Description: Replaces the normal A-Wall ability with a handheld amped shield carried in front of the player. Step 1: shield deployment and carry.

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_health
ConVars.Description: HP of the held A-Wall shield. 0 = use default (850).

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_forward_offset
ConVars.Description: How far in front of the player the shield hovers (units).

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_vertical_offset
ConVars.Description: Vertical offset of the held shield (positive = up).

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_duration
ConVars.Description: Duration of held shield in seconds. 0 = infinite.
